purpose: Single consolidated todo for fixing the Autopilot new-project/coding flow with a configurable ProposeStrategyOrchestrator, LLM-assisted flexible normalization, safe worker/runtime selection, execution from normalized proposals, and artifact-first completion.
problem_statement: ananta new-project creates a goal and tasks, but the propose step can fail with autopilot_no_executable_step. The current fallback path calls sgpt/LM Studio without real API tool schemas, receives free text, fails to parse command/tool_calls, attempts repair with the same weak path, then returns llm_failed. The correct architecture is not 'never ask the LLM'. The correct architecture is: prepare LLMs well, accept multiple output formats, normalize/repair/classify safely, execute only normalized executable proposals, and complete tasks from real artifacts/verification.
original_failure_flow: Autopilot calls POST /tasks/<tid>/step/propose for task_kind coding/new_software_project
_try_handler_propose returns None because no suitable handler is registered
_try_hermes_propose returns None when Hermes is disabled
_propose_single_task_step builds prompt and writes .ananta/tool-definitions.json as text
sgpt calls LM Studio /v1/chat/completions without tools parameter
model returns prose/Markdown instead of machine action
repair path repeats same class of problem
target_flow: Orchestrator loads effective ProposePolicy for system/project/blueprint/task_kind
LLM-capable strategies use real tools/schema where possible and LLMResponseNormalizer for flexible outputs
Only ExecutableProposal with command/tool_calls can be persisted as last_proposal
Execution creates or modifies workspace files
WorkerOutputCollector reads ArtifactManifest or synthesizes FileChangeSet
global_principles: LLM use is desired for project creation and project evolution, but raw LLM text is never executable control state.
Deterministic handlers are fast paths and guardrails, not a replacement for LLM reasoning.
Exactly one ProposeStrategyOrchestrator owns strategy order, fallback behavior and diagnostics.
Tool-calling LLM means real API tools parameter, not only text instructions or .ananta/tool-definitions.json.
LLM output may be tool_calls, strict JSON, fenced JSON, YAML-like text, file blocks, shell blocks, unified diff, Markdown plan or natural language.
Every LLM/worker output must normalize to ExecutableProposal, PatchProposalArtifact, FileProposalArtifact, PlannerProposalArtifact, AdvisoryProposalArtifact, NeedsReviewResult or FailedResult.
Only ExecutableProposal may be executed directly.
Patch/file proposals require validation and optional approval before apply.
Legacy sgpt is disabled by default and available only as explicit compatibility strategy.
Completion comes from artifacts, manifests, diffs and verification, not from final assistant text.
Malformed outputs move to repair, next strategy or needs_review; never infinite retry.
ContextAccessPolicy must be applied before sending project/code/secrets to local, remote or cloud models/workers.

tasks.title: Define ExecutableProposal and ProposeStrategyResult contracts
acceptance_criteria: ExecutableProposal contains proposal_id, goal_id, task_id, strategy_id, command, tool_calls, required_tools, expected_artifacts, safety_flags, reason, created_at and metadata.
At least one of command or non-empty tool_calls is required.
ProposeStrategyResult supports executable, declined, advisory, needs_review, failed and policy_denied.
Only executable result may contain ExecutableProposal.
Free text only is rejected as executable.
Tests cover valid command, valid tool_calls, advisory text, declined, invalid executable.

tasks.title: Define ProposePolicy with configurable strategy chain
acceptance_criteria: Policy supports strategy_order, llm_mode, accepted_output_formats, allow_legacy_sgpt, allow_unstructured_text_as_execution, max_strategy_attempts, max_repair_attempts, requires_executable_step, on_parse_error and on_all_strategies_declined.
llm_mode supports disabled, fallback, assisted and primary_with_guardrails.
Policy supports task_kind overrides for new_software_project, coding, repair, research and documentation.
Default allow_legacy_sgpt=false and allow_unstructured_text_as_execution=false.
Merge precedence: system default -> project -> blueprint role -> task override.
Unsafe configs are rejected unless explicit admin override exists.
Tests cover defaults, overrides, invalid strategy, unsafe config rejection.

tasks.title: Inventory and block ungoverned legacy propose paths
acceptance_criteria: _try_handler_propose, _try_hermes_propose, _propose_single_task_step, _repair_task_proposal and parse_structured_action_payload usages are mapped to strategies or marked advisory.
propose_task_step no longer directly calls sgpt/run_sgpt_command outside LegacySgptStrategy.
Static or service test fails if sgpt is called directly from propose_task_step.
JSON parsing from LLM text is classified as strategy normalization, not global control flow.
anti_patterns: No hidden fallback path bypassing ProposePolicy

tasks.title: Define proposal artifact types
acceptance_criteria: PlannerProposalArtifact stores non-executable plans/advice.
FileProposalArtifact stores proposed file writes with safe relative paths and content refs/hashes.
PatchProposalArtifact stores unified diffs/patches with target paths and safety metadata.
Artifacts include source strategy/model, parse status, confidence, validation errors and adoption status.
Path traversal and absolute paths are rejected.
anti_patterns: No direct execution of file blocks/diffs without validation

tasks.title: Implement ProposeStrategyOrchestrator
acceptance_criteria: propose_task_step delegates to ProposeStrategyOrchestrator.
Orchestrator loads effective ProposePolicy and iterates strategies in order.
First executable result stops the chain and persists last_proposal.
Declined result advances to next strategy.
Advisory result is stored and advances unless policy says needs_review.
Parse/normalization failure advances to next strategy when configured.
All strategies exhausted returns needs_review or failed, not retry loop.
Result contains attempted_strategies, selected_strategy, reasons and advisory refs.
Tests cover first success, fallback, parse error, all declined.

tasks.title: Wrap TaskHandlerRegistry as DeterministicHandlerStrategy
acceptance_criteria: Strategy looks up handler by task_kind.
No handler returns declined handler_not_found.
Handler returning None returns declined handler_declined.
Handler command/tool_calls are normalized into ExecutableProposal.
Invalid handler payload returns failed invalid_strategy_output.
Existing DeterministicRepairHandler remains compatible.

tasks.title: Implement TemplateProposeHandler for immediate new-project/coding baseline
acceptance_criteria: Handler registered for coding and new_software_project on Hub startup.
Fibonacci/new-project task returns executable command or tool_calls without sgpt/LM Studio/generate_text.
Handler uses tool_definitions_resolver and allowed_tools.
Prefers write_file tool_calls when available; uses deterministic shell command only when shell is allowed and tool_calls execution is not reliable.
Unsupported or unsafe task returns None/declined.
Tests monkeypatch sgpt/generate_text to fail and prove handler still proposes.

tasks.title: Implement WorkerStrategy for OpenCode/Hermes/native workers
acceptance_criteria: WorkerStrategy uses WorkerRuntimeSelectionService for proposal mode.
Worker/runtime/context policy is checked before sending context.
Worker output is normalized through LLMResponseNormalizer or worker-specific adapter.
Free text becomes advisory, not executable.
Disabled/unavailable workers return declined/failed cleanly.
Tests cover Hermes disabled, OpenCode patch proposal, native local worker, cloud blocked.

tasks.title: Implement ToolCallingLLMStrategy and JsonSchemaLLMStrategy
acceptance_criteria: ToolCallingLLMStrategy calls first-class model API, not sgpt.
Tool schemas are passed as real API tools/function schemas where supported.
Provider without tools returns declined tools_not_supported.
JsonSchemaLLMStrategy uses provider response_format/json_schema where supported.
Invalid or text-only output is normalized/advisory/failed and does not become executable.
Tests mock valid tool_calls, tools unsupported, valid schema, invalid schema and prose.

tasks.title: Implement LLMResponseNormalizer for flexible outputs
acceptance_criteria: Normalizer accepts raw_text, provider_response, tool_calls, task_context and expected_output_contract.
OpenAI-compatible tool_calls normalize to ExecutableProposal.tool_calls.
Strict JSON and fenced JSON can normalize to ExecutableProposal after schema validation.
Shell code block can normalize to command only when policy allows shell and command policy accepts it.
Unified diff normalizes to PatchProposalArtifact.
File blocks normalize to FileProposalArtifact or safe write_file tool_calls when allowed.
Plain natural language normalizes to AdvisoryProposalArtifact.
Every result has source_format, confidence, reason_codes and safety_warnings.
Tests cover tool_calls, strict JSON, fenced JSON, shell block, diff, file blocks, prose.

tasks.title: Implement bounded LLM repair/coercion
acceptance_criteria: Repair runs at most once per strategy attempt by default.
Repair prompt includes original output, validation errors, target schema, allowed tools/formats and safety limits.
Repaired output must pass the same normalization/schema/security checks.
Failure becomes advisory/needs_review/next_strategy, not recursive retry.
Repair cannot broaden permissions or bypass allowed_tools/context policy.
Telemetry records repair_attempted, repair_success and reason_codes.

tasks.title: Prepare LLM calls with rich governed context
acceptance_criteria: LLM context includes goal, task title, task_kind, current workspace summary, relevant CodeCompass/RAG context, allowed tools, expected artifacts, constraints and examples.
ContextAccessPolicy filters context before local/remote/cloud model calls.
Expected artifacts and output contract are included.
Cloud/external destinations do not receive forbidden code/secrets.
Tests verify expected artifacts included and sensitive context excluded for cloud.
anti_patterns: No full project/secrets to cloud by default

tasks.title: Make execute consume only normalized ExecutableProposal
acceptance_criteria: last_proposal persists normalized ExecutableProposal.
Execute without explicit command uses last_proposal only if executable.
Advisory, patch-only, file-proposal-only or needs_review result cannot be executed directly.
command and tool_calls execution paths are explicit.
Failure reasons distinguish no_executable_proposal, policy_denied and runtime/tool failure.

tasks.title: Collect ArtifactManifest and FileChangeSet after execution
acceptance_criteria: ArtifactManifest schema validates generated/modified/test artifacts with relative paths and hashes.
FileChangeSet captures created/modified/deleted files from before/after snapshots.
Collector reads worker-written manifest when present.
Collector can synthesize manifest from diff when policy allows.
Path traversal, absolute paths and symlink escape are rejected or flagged.
Fibonacci files app.py, requirements.txt, README.md/tests are represented as artifacts.

tasks.title: Implement ArtifactCompletionPolicyService and verification bridge
acceptance_criteria: Policy supports required_artifacts, required_paths, optional_paths, verification_required, allowed_synthesized_manifest, retry_conditions and needs_review_conditions.
Decision statuses include completed, needs_review, retryable_failed, failed, denied and degraded.
Verification checks files/artifacts/tests, not model claims.
Valid artifacts plus passed verification returns completed.
Missing required artifact or failed verification returns retry/needs_review/failed according to policy.
Malformed final model text is ignored/advisory when artifacts pass.

tasks.title: Prevent retry loops and add needs_review terminal path
acceptance_criteria: Parser/normalization failures from optional/advisory strategies do not requeue forever.
No executable proposal after all strategies returns needs_review or configured failure.
Retry counter increments only for retryable execution/artifact/verification failures.
Max retry guard is enforced.
State records reason codes: no_strategy_executable, advisory_parse_failed_ignored, missing_required_artifact, verification_failed.
Regression test reproduces original sgpt/prose failure and proves no infinite retry.

tasks.title: E2E new-project Fibonacci through orchestrator and artifact completion
acceptance_criteria: Test submits new-project Fibonacci API goal.
Autoplanner creates tasks.
First coding/new_software_project task is handled before legacy sgpt.
run_sgpt_command is monkeypatched to raise and flow still succeeds for supported task.
Propose returns command/tool_calls and no autopilot_no_executable_step.
Execute creates app.py, requirements.txt, README.md and tests as configured.
pytest or verification passes.
Task completes from artifacts/verification without manual file creation or status patch.

tasks.title: E2E flexible LLM-assisted project creation and evolution
acceptance_criteria: Mocked LLM tool_calls are accepted and executed.
Mocked fenced JSON normalizes and executes when valid.
Mocked file blocks become write_file tool_calls or FileProposalArtifact.
Mocked unified diff becomes PatchProposalArtifact and needs apply/approval path.
Plain natural language becomes AdvisoryProposalArtifact and does not execute.
All executable paths still require artifact collection and verification.

tasks.title: Expose strategy, LLM normalization and artifact completion in API/CLI/UI
acceptance_criteria: Task detail API includes effective propose policy, attempted_strategies, selected_strategy, proposal_status, proposal_reason, normalization_format and advisory refs.
Task detail API includes artifact_summary, manifest_status, verification_status, completion_decision and reason_codes.
CLI shows selected strategy, LLM output format/normalization result and artifact list with hash prefixes.
UI shows strategy chain and artifact completion summary with warning badges for legacy sgpt/advisory parse failure.
Raw secrets/full artifact contents are not shown by default.

tasks.title: Config, docs and removal of replaced todo files
acceptance_criteria: Project/BlueprintRole config can store propose_policy without dropping advanced fields.
Bundle import/export preserves propose_policy.
Docs explain original root cause, strategy chain, LLM-assisted normalization, execute boundary and artifact-first completion.
Docs include Mermaid diagram for Task -> Orchestrator -> ExecutableProposal -> Execute -> ArtifactManifest/FileChangeSet -> Verify -> Complete.
Old todo.autopilot-template-propose-pipeline*.json and todo.autopilot-propose-llm-assisted-normalization-extension.json are removed or replaced by this file.
This JSON remains valid and is updated after implementation slices.

definition_of_done_global: The three replaced autopilot todo files are no longer needed as active planning sources.
ProposePolicy controls strategy order, LLM usage, accepted formats and fallback behavior.
TemplateProposeHandler fixes the immediate Fibonacci/new-project path without sgpt.
LLM-assisted project creation and evolution are supported through tool-calling, schema output and flexible normalization.
Legacy sgpt is disabled by default and explicit compatibility only.
ArtifactCompletionPolicy and verification decide task completion from real outputs.
Malformed model prose/JSON cannot cause infinite retry loops.
E2E tests prove Fibonacci new-project succeeds without sgpt propose path and with artifact-based completion.
